knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-025-Business-Continuity Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: BC-020 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: BC-001 Critical process inventory | Preventive | Require complete inventory before certification | Critical | COO. BC-002 Business impact analysis | Governance | Require BIA before plan approval | Critical | COO. BC-003 Approved RTO/RPO | Governance | Reject unapproved recovery objective | Critical | COO. BC-004 Continuity plan owner | Preventive | Reject plan without owner | High | COO. BC-005 Plan approval and review | Governance | Reject unapproved/expired plan | Critical | COO. BC-006 Crisis roles assigned | Preventive | Block activation without assigned roles | Critical | COO. BC-007 Crisis declaration authority | Preventive | Reject unauthorized declaration | Critical | CEO/COO. BC-008 Employee accountability | Evidence | Require accountability confirmation during crisis | High | HR. BC-009 Alternate-site readiness | Detective | Flag unready alternate site | High | COO. BC-010 Manual fallback procedures | Evidence | Require documented fallback for critical processes | Critical | Process Owner. BC-011 Third-party dependency mapping | Evidence | Require mapped critical vendor dependencies | Critical | COO. BC-012 Technology recovery integration | Preventive | Require alignment with published cyber/DR plans | Critical | CTO. BC-013 Communication approval | Preventive | Reject unapproved crisis communication | High | CEO/CCO. BC-014 Exercise schedule | Governance | Escalate overdue exercise | High | COO. BC-015 Exercise evidence | Evidence | Require documented exercise results | High | COO. BC-016 Recovery action tracking | Detective | Track to closure | Critical | COO. BC-017 Data reconciliation after recovery | Detective | Require reconciliation before declaring restored | Critical | Data Governance. BC-018 No AI crisis declaration | Preventive | Deny AI declaration permission | Critical | AI Governance. BC-019 No AI external communication | Preventive | Deny AI external publication permission | Critical | AI Governance. BC-020 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny | Critical | Security. BC-021 Plan versioning | Evidence | Require version on change | High | COO. BC-022 Emergency access control | Preventive | Log and time-box emergency access | Critical | Security. BC-023 Post-crisis review | Detective | Require post-crisis review record | High | COO. BC-024 Issue remediation | Corrective | Track remediation to closure | High | COO. BC-025 Board escalation | Corrective | Escalate material crisis to Board | Critical | CEO.
